subject: [PATCH v5 03/21] mm: swap: add an abstract API for locking out swapoff

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch introduces an abstract API to lock out swapoff in the Linux kernel's memory management subsystem. The current implementation of locking out swapoff is specific to the backing swap device and does not work well with the new virtual swap design, where a swap entry may not have a backing swap device. To address this issue, the patch adds two new functions: `tryget_swap_entry` and `put_swap_entry`, which provide a generic way to lock out swapoff for any swap entry. The patch also updates several kernel files to use these new functions instead of the old implementation. This change prepares the kernel for the virtual swap design and improves its flexibility in handling different types of swap entries.
